notes: v0.16.61 — Pre-match ship picker fires on EVERY match start. (1) Practice (Arena/Capture/Paint) and Boss Rush now pop the picker popup before the track carousel — banner shows mode + difficulty context, 4 class tiles on the left now use REAL animated SkinAtlas mini-ships (each draws the class's currently-equipped skin from active_skin_per_class with wobble), right side has the big ship preview + 2×3 module grid of the picked class's actual loadout. Confirm continues to the track carousel + match start. (2) Popup button band lifted 18px off the popup bottom edge — CANCEL / EDIT MODULES / OPEN no longer overlap the popup border. (3) Banner content is now metadata-driven so the same popup serves rift / practice / boss-rush. test_module_library.tscn ships with 3 mockup variants (HEX GRID / SLOT RAILS / ROW LIST) for the library redesign — not yet wired in-game, pick the layout and I'll port it. Windows only.
